description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: test, package-exe, and package-msi, all running on windows-latest. The test job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, sets up nmake and several other dependencies, builds the project, and runs tests. The package-exe and package-msi jobs depend on the test job and create executable and msi packages respectively, including downloading OpenSSL, and uploading the packages.
